result.summary: Found 3 issues: primarily a major layout problem with horizontal content clipping affecting multiple sections of the page, and a truncated navigation item.

issues.description: The rightmost column of game tiles is consistently clipped/cut off across both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections. Game titles like 'MAGNI PHO...' and 'MUNC MI...' are partially visible, indicating horizontal overflow or an improperly constrained grid layout.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the game grid uses proper responsive CSS (e.g., overflow: hidden on the container, or correct flex/grid column sizing) so the third column either fits fully within the viewport or scrolls horizontally in a controlled manner with visible affordance.

issues.description: The 'Hot Ga...' navigation tab in the top category bar is truncated. The label 'Hot Games' (or similar) is cut off, making it unclear to users what that tab represents.
issues.suggestion: Allow the navigation bar to horizontally scroll with a visible scroll indicator, or use icon-only tabs with tooltips to prevent text truncation at smaller viewport widths.

issues.description: The 'Cop the Lot' game tile in the Exclusive Games section displays a jackpot value of '$6,268.60' while the '3 Fiend Pots' tile shows '$13,015.68', but other game tiles show no jackpot values, creating visual inconsistency across cards.
issues.suggestion: Standardize game card design: either display jackpot amounts on all eligible games or use a consistent badge/label approach so cards have uniform visual weight.
